Kebbi State — Malaria RDT Test Positivity Rate

MG2 facility-level analysis vs. DHIS2 indicator

May 29, 2026

1 Overview

This document computes malaria RDT test positivity rate (TPR) for Kebbi State, Nigeria using facility-level data from DHIS2, and compares the result against the DHIS2 pre-computed indicator.

Data: Nigeria DHIS2 national HMIS (dhis2nigeria.org.ng), 6-year download, facility and ward-level records, January 2020 – April 2026.

TPR definition (RDT only):

\[ \text{TPR}_{\text{RDT}} = \frac{ \sum \text{Persons tested positive for malaria by RDT (all age groups)} }{ \sum \text{Persons presenting with fever \& tested by RDT (all age groups)} } \]

All analyses start from original (uncleaned) values (na_rm = TRUE). The final section notes how MAD-based outlier censoring affects results.

2 Load and filter data

kebbi_path <- file.path(kebbi_dir, kebbi_file)

if (!file.exists(kebbi_path)) {
  message("Building Kebbi cache — loading full Nigeria file (~66M rows)...")
  d_all <- fst::read_fst(
    file.path(nigeria_dir, nigeria_file),
    as.data.table = TRUE
  )
  kebbi <- d_all[State == "ke Kebbi State"]
  rm(d_all)
  gc()

  # Month is stored as days-since-1970-01-01 in this FST; convert to yearmonth
  # so that build_combined_dataset() and as.Date(yearmonth(...)) work correctly
  kebbi[, Month := tsibble::yearmonth(as.Date(Month, origin = "1970-01-01"))]

  saveRDS(kebbi, kebbi_path)
  message("Cached: ", kebbi_path)
} else {
  kebbi <- readRDS(kebbi_path)
}

cat(
  "Kebbi facility-months (all elements):",
  format(nrow(kebbi), big.mark = ","),
  "\n"
)
#> Kebbi facility-months (all elements): 1,860,580
cat(
  "Date range:",
  format(min(as.Date(kebbi$Month)), "%Y-%m"),
  "to",
  format(max(as.Date(kebbi$Month)), "%Y-%m"),
  "\n"
)
#> Date range: 2020-01 to 2026-04
cat("Org unit levels:", paste(sort(unique(kebbi$level)), collapse = ", "), "\n")
#> Org unit levels: 4, 5
cat(
  "Facilities (leaf):",
  format(sum(kebbi$effectiveLeaf & !duplicated(kebbi$orgUnit)), big.mark = ","),
  "\n"
)
#> Facilities (leaf): 996

3 Build TPR combined dataset

MG2’s build_combined_dataset() sums the four age-group categories of each data element to produce one numerator and one denominator value per facility-month, then applies the ratio validity rules:

  • Missing numerator + valid denominator → numerator treated as 0 (zero positives is plausible; blank entry is common practice)
  • Present numerator + missing/zero denominator → excluded
  • Numerator > denominator → excluded (impossible ratio)
steps <- list(list(
  operation = "Ratio",
  output_name = "TPR_RDT",
  max_value = 1,
  na_rm = TRUE,
  numerator = list(
    source_file = kebbi_file,
    cleaning_level = "original",
    data_values = c(
      "Persons tested positive for malaria by RDT_<5yrs",
      "Persons tested positive for malaria by RDT_>=5years",
      "Persons tested positive for malaria by RDT_\u22655yrs (excl PW)",
      "Persons tested positive for malaria by RDT_Preg Women (PW)"
    )
  ),
  denominator = list(
    source_file = kebbi_file,
    cleaning_level = "original",
    data_values = c(
      "Persons presenting with fever & tested by RDT_<5yrs",
      "Persons presenting with fever & tested by RDT_>=5years",
      "Persons presenting with fever & tested by RDT_\u22655yrs (excl PW)",
      "Persons presenting with fever & tested by RDT_Preg Women (PW)"
    )
  )
))

tpr_kebbi <- build_combined_dataset(
  steps = steps,
  data_folder = kebbi_dir,
  formula_name = "TPR_RDT",
  verbose = FALSE
)
#> 
#> * build_combined_dataset: TPR_RDT 
#> - data_folder: ~/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/Projects/MG2/reports/Nigeria/ 
#> - steps: 1 
#> - period type: Month 
#> 
#> - step 1 [ Ratio ] → TPR_RDT 
#>   [Ratio] na.rm = TRUE 
#>   [Ratio] numerator  → TPR_RDT ← file: kebbi_cache.rds | values: Persons tested positive for malaria by RDT_<5yrs, Persons tested positive for malaria by RDT_>=5years, Persons tested positive for malaria by RDT_≥5yrs (excl PW), Persons tested positive for malaria by RDT_Preg Women (PW) | cleaning: original 
#>    120696 rows after filter
#>   [Ratio] denominator → TPR_RDT ← file: kebbi_cache.rds | values: Persons presenting with fever & tested by RDT_<5yrs, Persons presenting with fever & tested by RDT_>=5years, Persons presenting with fever & tested by RDT_≥5yrs (excl PW), Persons presenting with fever & tested by RDT_Preg Women (PW) | cleaning: original 
#>    122375 rows after filter
#>   num rows: 48423  | den rows: 48919 
#>   joined rows: 49081 
#>   non-NA ratio values: 48261 
#>   missing_numerator: 658 
#>   missing_denominator: 162 
#>   step 1 produced 49081 rows
#> 
#> - binding 1 result(s)
#> - over_max: ' TPR_RDT ' max = 1 → 522 flagged
#> - Phase 2: scanning combined values for outliers (smallThreshold=0)
#>    963 series to scan
#> - Phase 2 complete: mad15= 284  mad10= 599  seasonal5= 749  seasonal3= 1054 
#> - done: 49081 rows | 1 variable(s): TPR_RDT
setDT(tpr_kebbi)
cat("Kebbi TPR rows:", format(nrow(tpr_kebbi), big.mark = ","), "\n")
#> Kebbi TPR rows: 49,081

3.1 Reporting completeness by category

fac <- tpr_kebbi[effectiveLeaf == TRUE]

fac[, .(
  total_rows = .N,
  valid_den_missing_num = sum(
    is.na(numerator) & !is.na(denominator) & denominator > 0
  ),
  both_valid = sum(
    !is.na(numerator) &
      !is.na(denominator) &
      denominator > 0 &
      numerator <= denominator
  ),
  orphaned_num = sum(
    !is.na(numerator) & (is.na(denominator) | denominator == 0)
  ),
  impossible_ratio = sum(
    !is.na(numerator) & !is.na(denominator) & numerator > denominator
  ),
  both_missing = sum(is.na(numerator) & is.na(denominator))
)] |>
  t() |>
  as.data.frame() |>
  setNames("n") |>
  within(pct <- round(n / n[1] * 100, 1))

4 TPR trend — Kebbi State

4.1 All facilities (aggregate)

# Apply validity rules and aggregate monthly
kebbi_monthly <- fac[
  !is.na(denominator) &
    denominator > 0 &
    (is.na(numerator) | numerator <= denominator),
  .(
    num = sum(fifelse(is.na(numerator), 0, numerator)),
    den = sum(denominator),
    n_fac = .N
  ),
  by = Month
]
kebbi_monthly[, `:=`(
  tpr_pct = num / den * 100,
  date = as.Date(yearmonth(as.character(Month)))
)]
setorder(kebbi_monthly, date)

ggplot(kebbi_monthly, aes(x = date)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = tpr_pct), colour = "#1f78b4", linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_point(aes(y = tpr_pct, size = n_fac), colour = "#1f78b4", alpha = 0.7) +
  scale_size_continuous(name = "Facilities\nreporting", range = c(1, 4)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%")) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "6 months", date_labels = "%b\n%Y") +
  labs(
    title = "Kebbi State — RDT Test Positivity Rate (all facilities)",
    subtitle = "Original values, na_rm = TRUE. Point size = facilities with valid denominator.",
    x = NULL,
    y = "TPR (%)"
  ) +
  theme_bw()

kebbi_monthly[, .(
  date,
  positives = num,
  tested = den,
  tpr_pct = round(tpr_pct, 1),
  n_fac
)]

4.2 Facility-level TPR distribution

# Compute per-facility average TPR for recent 2 years
recent_cutoff <- as.Date(max(kebbi_monthly$date)) - 365 * 2

fac_avg <- fac[
  as.Date(yearmonth(as.character(Month))) >= recent_cutoff &
    !is.na(denominator) &
    denominator > 0 &
    (is.na(numerator) | numerator <= denominator),
  .(
    num_total = sum(fifelse(is.na(numerator), 0, numerator)),
    den_total = sum(denominator),
    n_months = .N
  ),
  by = orgUnit
]
fac_avg[, tpr_pct := num_total / den_total * 100]
fac_avg <- fac_avg[den_total > 0]

# Join facility names from kebbi (orgUnitName not preserved by build_combined_dataset)
ou_names <- unique(kebbi[effectiveLeaf == TRUE, .(orgUnit, orgUnitName)])
fac_avg <- ou_names[fac_avg, on = "orgUnit"]

ggplot(fac_avg, aes(x = tpr_pct)) +
  geom_histogram(
    binwidth = 5,
    fill = "#1f78b4",
    colour = "white",
    alpha = 0.8
  ) +
  geom_vline(
    xintercept = kebbi_monthly[
      date >= recent_cutoff,
      sum(num) / sum(den) * 100
    ],
    linetype = "dashed",
    colour = "#e31a1c",
    linewidth = 0.9
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%")) +
  labs(
    title = paste0(
      "Facility TPR distribution — last 2 years (n = ",
      nrow(fac_avg),
      " facilities)"
    ),
    subtitle = "Red dashed line = aggregate Kebbi TPR for same period",
    x = "Facility TPR (%)",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_bw()

5 Champion facility analysis

Champion facilities are those that report consistently — here defined as having a valid denominator (tested count > 0) in at least a specified fraction of months during the analysis window.

# Analysis window: full date range in the data
date_range <- range(kebbi_monthly$date)
n_months_total <- nrow(kebbi_monthly)

# Count months each facility reported a valid denominator
fac_report_counts <- fac[
  !is.na(denominator) & denominator > 0,
  .(n_reported = .N),
  by = orgUnit
]
fac_all <- fac[, .(n_total = .N), by = orgUnit]
fac_summary <- merge(fac_all, fac_report_counts, by = "orgUnit", all.x = TRUE)
fac_summary[is.na(n_reported), n_reported := 0]
fac_summary[, pct_reported := n_reported / n_months_total * 100]

cat(
  "Facilities with ≥80% reporting:",
  sum(fac_summary$pct_reported >= 80),
  "\n"
)
#> Facilities with ≥80% reporting: 489
cat(
  "Facilities with ≥60% reporting:",
  sum(fac_summary$pct_reported >= 60),
  "\n"
)
#> Facilities with ≥60% reporting: 599
cat(
  "Facilities with ≥40% reporting:",
  sum(fac_summary$pct_reported >= 40),
  "\n"
)
#> Facilities with ≥40% reporting: 724

ggplot(fac_summary, aes(x = pct_reported)) +
  geom_histogram(
    binwidth = 5,
    fill = "#33a02c",
    colour = "white",
    alpha = 0.8
  ) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 80, linetype = "dashed", colour = "#e31a1c") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of facility reporting frequency",
    subtitle = "Red line = 80% threshold (champion criterion)",
    x = "% of months with valid denominator",
    y = "Facilities"
  ) +
  theme_bw()

champion_ids <- fac_summary[pct_reported >= 80, orgUnit]
cat("Champion facilities (≥80%):", length(champion_ids), "\n")
#> Champion facilities (≥80%): 489

# Monthly TPR: champions vs. all
champ_monthly <- fac[
  orgUnit %in%
    champion_ids &
    !is.na(denominator) &
    denominator > 0 &
    (is.na(numerator) | numerator <= denominator),
  .(
    num = sum(fifelse(is.na(numerator), 0, numerator)),
    den = sum(denominator),
    n_fac = .N
  ),
  by = Month
]
champ_monthly[, `:=`(
  tpr_pct = num / den * 100,
  date = as.Date(yearmonth(as.character(Month))),
  group = "Champions (≥80% reporting)"
)]

all_monthly <- copy(kebbi_monthly)[, group := "All facilities"]
setnames(all_monthly, "tpr_pct", "tpr_pct")

plot_champ <- rbind(
  champ_monthly[, .(date, tpr_pct, n_fac, group)],
  all_monthly[, .(date, tpr_pct, n_fac, group)]
)

ggplot(plot_champ, aes(x = date, y = tpr_pct, colour = group)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_point(aes(size = n_fac), alpha = 0.7) +
  scale_colour_manual(
    values = c(
      "Champions (≥80% reporting)" = "#33a02c",
      "All facilities" = "#1f78b4"
    )
  ) +
  scale_size_continuous(name = "Facilities", range = c(1, 4)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%")) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "6 months", date_labels = "%b\n%Y") +
  labs(
    title = "Kebbi State RDT TPR — champions vs. all facilities",
    x = NULL,
    y = "TPR (%)",
    colour = NULL
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

6 Comparison with DHIS2 indicators

Two DHIS2 indicators cover RDT positivity. They have different formulas and the comparison reveals an important data quality issue.

Indicator ID Formula
% of Fever cases tested positive with RDT l2eIpdluuTI Positives (total) / Tested (total) ✓
Test Positivity Rate(TPR) (RDT) uiA07P72s2Z Positives (4 groups) / Positives + Tested (3 of 4 groups) ✗

The second indicator’s denominator adds RDT positives to the tested count and omits the >=5years tested category. This is an error in the DHIS2 configuration and will produce a systematically different (lower) denominator when positivity is high.

library(httr)

DHIS2_CACHE <- file.path(kebbi_dir, "kebbi_dhis2_indicators.rds")

kebbi_ou <- "M689V9w3Gs3"

# One period string per year — sent as separate requests to avoid timeouts.
# Each element is a ";"-joined list of YYYYMM codes for that calendar year.
period_batches <- c(
  paste0(2020, sprintf("%02d", 1:12), collapse = ";"),
  paste0(2021, sprintf("%02d", 1:12), collapse = ";"),
  paste0(2022, sprintf("%02d", 1:12), collapse = ";"),
  paste0(2023, sprintf("%02d", 1:12), collapse = ";"),
  paste0(2024, sprintf("%02d", 1:12), collapse = ";"),
  paste0(2025, sprintf("%02d", 1:12), collapse = ";"),
  paste0(2026, sprintf("%02d", 1:4),  collapse = ";")
)

# fetch_indicator(): loops over annual period batches, one request per year,
# then combines results.  Returns NULL only if every batch fails.
fetch_indicator <- function(ind_id, label, base_url, username, password,
                            batch_pause = 1) {
  cat("Fetching:", label, "\n")
  cat("Indicator UID:", ind_id, "| batches:", length(period_batches), "\n\n")

  batch_results <- vector("list", length(period_batches))

  for (i in seq_along(period_batches)) {
    yr_label <- substr(period_batches[[i]], 1, 4)   # "2020", "2021", …
    url <- paste0(
      base_url,
      "api/analytics.json",
      "?dimension=dx:", ind_id,
      "&dimension=pe:", period_batches[[i]],
      "&dimension=ou:", kebbi_ou,
      "&includeNumDen=true&skipRounding=false&displayProperty=NAME"
    )

    cat("  Batch", i, "(", yr_label, "):", url, "\n")

    resp <- tryCatch(
      GET(url, authenticate(username, password), timeout(30)),
      error = function(e) {
        cat("    ERROR (connection):", conditionMessage(e), "\n")
        NULL
      }
    )

    if (is.null(resp)) {
      cat("    RESULT: no response (timeout or DNS failure) — skipping\n")
      next
    }

    sc <- status_code(resp)
    cat("    HTTP:", sc)

    if (sc == 401) {
      cat(" — authentication failed, aborting all batches\n")
      return(NULL)
    }
    if (sc != 200) {
      cat(" — unexpected status, skipping batch\n")
      cat("    Body:", rawToChar(content(resp, "raw")), "\n")
      next
    }

    d <- content(resp, as = "parsed")
    if (length(d$rows) == 0) {
      cat(" — 0 rows returned\n")
      next
    }

    rows <- lapply(d$rows, function(r) {
      data.frame(
        period      = r[[2]],
        value       = as.numeric(r[[4]]),
        numerator   = as.numeric(r[[5]]),
        denominator = as.numeric(r[[6]]),
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    })
    batch_results[[i]] <- as.data.table(do.call(rbind, rows))
    cat(" —", nrow(batch_results[[i]]), "rows\n")

    if (i < length(period_batches)) Sys.sleep(batch_pause)
  }

  combined <- rbindlist(Filter(Negate(is.null), batch_results))
  if (nrow(combined) == 0) {
    cat("\n  RESULT: no data returned across all batches\n")
    return(NULL)
  }

  combined[, `:=`(
    date  = as.Date(paste0(period, "01"), format = "%Y%m%d"),
    label = label
  )]
  cat("\n  TOTAL:", nrow(combined), "rows,",
      format(min(combined$date), "%Y-%m"), "–",
      format(max(combined$date), "%Y-%m"), "\n")
  combined
}
# ── Load from cache or fetch from DHIS2 ────────────────────────────────────
# Re-run this chunk interactively to force a fresh download:
#   delete kebbi_dhis2_indicators.rds, or set force_fetch <- TRUE

force_fetch <- FALSE   # ← set TRUE to bypass cache

if (!force_fetch && file.exists(DHIS2_CACHE)) {

  cat("Loading DHIS2 indicators from cache:", DHIS2_CACHE, "\n")
  dhis2_cache <- readRDS(DHIS2_CACHE)
  dhis2_correct <- dhis2_cache$correct
  dhis2_errored <- dhis2_cache$errored
  cat("  correct indicator rows:", if (is.null(dhis2_correct)) "NULL" else nrow(dhis2_correct), "\n")
  cat("  errored indicator rows:", if (is.null(dhis2_errored)) "NULL" else nrow(dhis2_errored), "\n")

} else {

  cat("Fetching DHIS2 indicators from live instance...\n")
  cat("Base URL:", creds$url, "\n\n")

  dhis2_correct <- fetch_indicator(
    "l2eIpdluuTI",
    "DHIS2: % Fever cases positive (correct formula)",
    creds$url, creds$username, creds$password
  )

  cat("\n")

  dhis2_errored <- fetch_indicator(
    "uiA07P72s2Z",
    "DHIS2: TPR(RDT) (formula error in denominator)",
    creds$url, creds$username, creds$password
  )

  if (!is.null(dhis2_correct) || !is.null(dhis2_errored)) {
    saveRDS(
      list(correct = dhis2_correct, errored = dhis2_errored),
      DHIS2_CACHE
    )
    cat("\nSaved to cache:", DHIS2_CACHE, "\n")
  } else {
    cat("\nBoth fetches failed — nothing saved to cache.\n")
  }
}
#> Fetching DHIS2 indicators from live instance...
#> Base URL: https://dhis2nigeria.org.ng/dhis/ 
#> 
#> Fetching: DHIS2: % Fever cases positive (correct formula) 
#> Indicator UID: l2eIpdluuTI | batches: 7 
#> 
#>   Batch 1 ( 2020 ): https://dhis2nigeria.org.ng/dhis/api/analytics.json?dimension=dx:l2eIpdluuTI&dimension=pe:202001;202002;202003;202004;202005;202006;202007;202008;202009;202010;202011;202012&dimension=ou:M689V9w3Gs3&includeNumDen=true&skipRounding=false&displayProperty=NAME 
#>     HTTP: 200 — 12 rows
#>   Batch 2 ( 2021 ): https://dhis2nigeria.org.ng/dhis/api/analytics.json?dimension=dx:l2eIpdluuTI&dimension=pe:202101;202102;202103;202104;202105;202106;202107;202108;202109;202110;202111;202112&dimension=ou:M689V9w3Gs3&includeNumDen=true&skipRounding=false&displayProperty=NAME 
#>     HTTP: 200 — 12 rows
#>   Batch 3 ( 2022 ): https://dhis2nigeria.org.ng/dhis/api/analytics.json?dimension=dx:l2eIpdluuTI&dimension=pe:202201;202202;202203;202204;202205;202206;202207;202208;202209;202210;202211;202212&dimension=ou:M689V9w3Gs3&includeNumDen=true&skipRounding=false&displayProperty=NAME 
#>     HTTP: 200 — 12 rows
#>   Batch 4 ( 2023 ): https://dhis2nigeria.org.ng/dhis/api/analytics.json?dimension=dx:l2eIpdluuTI&dimension=pe:202301;202302;202303;202304;202305;202306;202307;202308;202309;202310;202311;202312&dimension=ou:M689V9w3Gs3&includeNumDen=true&skipRounding=false&displayProperty=NAME 
#>     HTTP: 200 — 12 rows
#>   Batch 5 ( 2024 ): https://dhis2nigeria.org.ng/dhis/api/analytics.json?dimension=dx:l2eIpdluuTI&dimension=pe:202401;202402;202403;202404;202405;202406;202407;202408;202409;202410;202411;202412&dimension=ou:M689V9w3Gs3&includeNumDen=true&skipRounding=false&displayProperty=NAME 
#>     HTTP: 200 — 12 rows
#>   Batch 6 ( 2025 ): https://dhis2nigeria.org.ng/dhis/api/analytics.json?dimension=dx:l2eIpdluuTI&dimension=pe:202501;202502;202503;202504;202505;202506;202507;202508;202509;202510;202511;202512&dimension=ou:M689V9w3Gs3&includeNumDen=true&skipRounding=false&displayProperty=NAME 
#>     HTTP: 200 — 12 rows
#>   Batch 7 ( 2026 ): https://dhis2nigeria.org.ng/dhis/api/analytics.json?dimension=dx:l2eIpdluuTI&dimension=pe:202601;202602;202603;202604&dimension=ou:M689V9w3Gs3&includeNumDen=true&skipRounding=false&displayProperty=NAME 
#>     HTTP: 200 — 4 rows
#> 
#>   TOTAL: 76 rows, 2020-01 – 2026-04 
#> 
#> Fetching: DHIS2: TPR(RDT) (formula error in denominator) 
#> Indicator UID: uiA07P72s2Z | batches: 7 
#> 
#>   Batch 1 ( 2020 ): https://dhis2nigeria.org.ng/dhis/api/analytics.json?dimension=dx:uiA07P72s2Z&dimension=pe:202001;202002;202003;202004;202005;202006;202007;202008;202009;202010;202011;202012&dimension=ou:M689V9w3Gs3&includeNumDen=true&skipRounding=false&displayProperty=NAME 
#>     ERROR (connection): Timeout was reached [dhis2nigeria.org.ng]:
#> Operation timed out after 30002 milliseconds with 0 bytes received 
#>     RESULT: no response (timeout or DNS failure) — skipping
#>   Batch 2 ( 2021 ): https://dhis2nigeria.org.ng/dhis/api/analytics.json?dimension=dx:uiA07P72s2Z&dimension=pe:202101;202102;202103;202104;202105;202106;202107;202108;202109;202110;202111;202112&dimension=ou:M689V9w3Gs3&includeNumDen=true&skipRounding=false&displayProperty=NAME 
#>     ERROR (connection): Timeout was reached [dhis2nigeria.org.ng]:
#> Operation timed out after 30002 milliseconds with 0 bytes received 
#>     RESULT: no response (timeout or DNS failure) — skipping
#>   Batch 3 ( 2022 ): https://dhis2nigeria.org.ng/dhis/api/analytics.json?dimension=dx:uiA07P72s2Z&dimension=pe:202201;202202;202203;202204;202205;202206;202207;202208;202209;202210;202211;202212&dimension=ou:M689V9w3Gs3&includeNumDen=true&skipRounding=false&displayProperty=NAME 
#>     HTTP: 200 — 12 rows
#>   Batch 4 ( 2023 ): https://dhis2nigeria.org.ng/dhis/api/analytics.json?dimension=dx:uiA07P72s2Z&dimension=pe:202301;202302;202303;202304;202305;202306;202307;202308;202309;202310;202311;202312&dimension=ou:M689V9w3Gs3&includeNumDen=true&skipRounding=false&displayProperty=NAME 
#>     ERROR (connection): Timeout was reached [dhis2nigeria.org.ng]:
#> Operation timed out after 30002 milliseconds with 0 bytes received 
#>     RESULT: no response (timeout or DNS failure) — skipping

#> Operation timed out after 30002 milliseconds with 0 bytes received 
#>     RESULT: no response (timeout or DNS failure) — skipping

#>     ERROR (connection): Timeout was reached [dhis2nigeria.org.ng]:
#> Operation timed out after 30002 milliseconds with 0 bytes received 
#>     RESULT: no response (timeout or DNS failure) — skipping
#>   Batch 7 ( 2026 ): https://dhis2nigeria.org.ng/dhis/api/analytics.json?dimension=dx:uiA07P72s2Z&dimension=pe:202601;202602;202603;202604&dimension=ou:M689V9w3Gs3&includeNumDen=true&skipRounding=false&displayProperty=NAME 
#>     HTTP: 200 — 4 rows

#>   TOTAL: 16 rows, 2022-01 – 2026-04 
#> 
#> Saved to cache: ~/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/Projects/MG2/reports/Nigeria//kebbi_dhis2_indicators.rds

if (is.null(dhis2_correct)) {
  cat("\n⚠  dhis2_correct is NULL — Section 6 comparison plots will be skipped.\n")
}
mg2_line <- kebbi_monthly[, .(
  date,
  value = tpr_pct,
  numerator = num,
  denominator = den,
  label = "MG2 (facility-level, original values)"
)]

all_series <- rbindlist(
  Filter(
    Negate(is.null),
    list(
      mg2_line,
      dhis2_correct[, .(date, value, numerator, denominator, label)],
      dhis2_errored[, .(date, value, numerator, denominator, label)]
    )
  ),
  fill = TRUE
)

ggplot(all_series, aes(x = date, y = value, colour = label)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 1.5, alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_colour_manual(
    values = c(
      "MG2 (facility-level, original values)" = "#1f78b4",
      "DHIS2: % Fever cases positive (correct formula)" = "#33a02c",
      "DHIS2: TPR(RDT) (formula error in denominator)" = "#e31a1c"
    )
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%")) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "6 months", date_labels = "%b\n%Y") +
  labs(
    title = "Kebbi State RDT TPR — MG2 vs. DHIS2 indicators",
    subtitle = "Red series uses erroneous DHIS2 formula (positives added to denominator)",
    x = NULL,
    y = "TPR (%)",
    colour = NULL
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.text = element_text(size = 8))

6.1 Numerator / denominator comparison

# Compare counts for the correct DHIS2 indicator vs. MG2
nd_compare <- merge(
  mg2_line[, .(date, mg2_num = numerator, mg2_den = denominator)],
  dhis2_correct[, .(date, dhis2_num = numerator, dhis2_den = denominator)],
  by = "date",
  all = TRUE
)
nd_compare[, `:=`(
  num_ratio = round(mg2_num / dhis2_num, 2),
  den_ratio = round(mg2_den / dhis2_den, 2)
)]
nd_compare

Differences in numerator and denominator counts between MG2 and the DHIS2 indicator reflect:

  1. Aggregation path: DHIS2 uses the default (total) category option combo for the data elements; MG2 sums the four age-group category option combos. If the “total” rows in DHIS2 are stored separately from the disaggregated rows, one approach double-counts.
  2. Zero-imputation: MG2 imputes missing numerators as 0 when the denominator is present; DHIS2 may not, depending on how the analytics table was built.
  3. Outlier cleaning: Not applied here (original values); would reduce extreme values in the MG2 series.

7 Notes on outlier cleaning

This analysis uses original values throughout. The same analysis with cleaning_level = "mad10" would exclude values flagged as more than 10× the median absolute deviation from the series median. To explore this, change the cleaning_level argument in Section 3 to "mad10" and re-render.

# Preview: how many facility-months are flagged at each cleaning level in Kebbi
rdt_pos <- kebbi[data %like% "Persons tested positive.*RDT"]
rdt_tested <- kebbi[data %like% "Persons presenting.*RDT"]

cat("=== Numerator (RDT positives) ===\n")
#> === Numerator (RDT positives) ===
rdt_pos[, .(
  total = .N,
  over_max = sum(over_max, na.rm = TRUE),
  mad15 = sum(mad15, na.rm = TRUE),
  mad10 = sum(mad10, na.rm = TRUE),
  seasonal5 = sum(seasonal5, na.rm = TRUE),
  seasonal3 = sum(seasonal3, na.rm = TRUE)
)]

cat("\n=== Denominator (RDT tested) ===\n")
#> 
#> === Denominator (RDT tested) ===
rdt_tested[, .(
  total = .N,
  over_max = sum(over_max, na.rm = TRUE),
  mad15 = sum(mad15, na.rm = TRUE),
  mad10 = sum(mad10, na.rm = TRUE),
  seasonal5 = sum(seasonal5, na.rm = TRUE),
  seasonal3 = sum(seasonal3, na.rm = TRUE)
)]
